jokes.setup: A SQL query walks into a bar and approaches two tables.

jokes.text: I would tell you a UDP joke, but you might not get it.

jokes.setup: Why did the developer go broke?
jokes.punchline: Because they used up all their cache.

jokes.text: There are two hard things in computer science: cache invalidation, naming things, and off-by-one errors.

jokes.setup: Why did the paperclip get promoted?
jokes.punchline: It held everything together under pressure.

jokes.text: Debugging is like being the detective in a mystery where you are also the person who misplaced the evidence.

jokes.setup: Why did the printer join standup?
jokes.punchline: It already had great timing and a paper trail.

jokes.text: I started an elevator company. It has its ups and downs.

jokes.punchline: They know how to keep things in order.

jokes.text: I tried to make a tree joke in Git, but it went off on a branch.

jokes.setup: Why did the calendar apply for leave?

jokes.text: DNS jokes are hard to explain because everyone resolves them differently.

jokes.setup: Why did the meeting bring a ladder?
jokes.punchline: It wanted to take things to the next level.

jokes.text: My keyboard and I are taking things slowly. There is a lot of space between us.

jokes.setup: Why was the JSON file invited to every meeting?

jokes.text: I explained my bug to a rubber duck and now the duck has opened a ticket.

jokes.setup: Why did the semicolon skip the party?

jokes.text: The button said it was under pressure, but honestly it was built for it.

jokes.setup: Why did the sandwich file a support request?
jokes.punchline: It was stuck between two priorities.

jokes.text: Object-oriented jokes have class, but only after construction.

jokes.setup: Why did the desk lamp win employee of the month?

jokes.text: I tried to contribute to dinner, but I accidentally forked the recipe.

jokes.setup: Why did the office chair get a performance bonus?

jokes.text: I put my joke in the cloud. Now it has availability concerns.

jokes.setup: Two cannibals ate a clown for lunch.
jokes.punchline: One asked, "Does this taste funny to you?"

jokes.text: To understand recursion, first understand recursion.

jokes.setup: Why did the joke need three approvals?
jokes.punchline: It was entering the official record.
